title: Fresh Fragrant Thai Fruit Curry
description: A resinous and crisp Thai dish featuring a mix of fruit, coconut cream, and paleo-friendly ingredients, served in a bamboo steamer to cure hangovers. This curry is made with a variety of fruits and spices.

ingredients.name: mixed fruit
ingredients.notes: such as pineapple, mango, and kiwi

instructions: Heat the coconut cream in a saucepan over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Add the Thai red curry paste and stir until it is well combined with the coconut cream.
Add the mixed fruit, fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan and stir until the fruit is well coated with the curry sauce.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped fresh basil.
Transfer the curry to a bamboo steamer and serve hot.
Garnish with additional fresh basil if desired.
Serve with paleo-friendly sides such as cauliflower rice or roasted vegetables.
